generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor capturing ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor capturing steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from processed LiDAR and depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing timeseries vehicle state data and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted, DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQL
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and driving path for operator situational awareness"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports of vehicle state timeseries data for developer troubleshooting and performance analysis"
]

instance ACCLogicExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of ACC logic execution on cloud resources"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization, report generation, and data saving"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic execution on cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCLogicExecutionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance JetsonProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Jetson processing services enabled by NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK"
]

instance PrototypingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prototyping services enabled by Python 3.8"
]

instance ROS2NodeLifecycleService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ROS2 node lifecycle management enabled by C++"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering services enabled by MATLAB/Simulink"
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data storage services enabled by SQL"
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-component communication and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonProcessingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables PrototypingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2NodeLifecycleService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringService
]

instance SQL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands to motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle direction control"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for upper-level chassis processing"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on cloud server"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on remote server for operator interface"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity handling inter-entity communication"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4AutonomousVehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built by retrofitting a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle with autonomy components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, JetsonNX, JetsonOrinNano, PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, DataTranslationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC-compliant desired speed commands, emergency braking signals, and steering angle adjustments from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE and Actuation FE to the vehicle's motor and steering servo actuators for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity per 3GPP TS 22.185 requirements, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across distributed components for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle-mounted sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection, Reporting), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), used for real-time monitoring, remote management, and optimization of the deployed 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle's ACC system during active operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication within the vehicle, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin/User Entities, with Data Translation FE handling serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) and User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel) hosted on remote cloud/external servers, with SQL database external to the vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture for digital twin framework, with ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622 Performance Class I specifications."
]
